fields.summary: Allow service to be started as System Services during serviceapi start up

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description:
This is extended from YARN-1593 focusing only on system services. System services are started during boot up of daemon or admin can be configurable and started at any point of time. These services have special characteristics which need to be respected. The document covers details about system services characteristics. 

This JIRA is focusing on configuring services using a json template and placing in a shared filesystem. During YARN REST server( native-service-api) start up read services details from shared location and start those services. If there are services already configured than skip those services and continue to start up the services.

fields.summary: Support auto-spawning of admin configured services during bootstrap of rm/apiserver

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

comments.body: Updated documentation that give brief about system services and design.
[~rohithsharma], the doc seems to cover part of YARN-1593. Is the intent to split system services out and leave YARN-1593 to only do system containers?

Yep, this is as part of YARN-1593 mainly intended for system service. The concept of system container vs system services is bit different. May be this JIRA could be a subtask of YARN-1593 too. But I created under YARN-5079 since code commit will be under native service branch.
Thanks. +1 on addressing system container and system services separately.
As per offline discussion with [~rohithsharma] we have done a POC for this. Please give contributor permission to attach POC patch.

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

comments.body: Updated documentation that give brief about system services and design.
[~rohithsharma], the doc seems to cover part of YARN-1593. Is the intent to split system services out and leave YARN-1593 to only do system containers?

Yep, this is as part of YARN-1593 mainly intended for system service. The concept of system container vs system services is bit different. May be this JIRA could be a subtask of YARN-1593 too. But I created under YARN-5079 since code commit will be under native service branch.
Thanks. +1 on addressing system container and system services separately.
As per offline discussion with [~rohithsharma] we have done a POC for this. Please give contributor permission to attach POC patch.
